description_long: This is a well-used Mizuno baseball glove, primarily tan with dark blue accents and lacing. The glove features a closed basket webbing pattern, providing a solid pocket for catching balls. The interior palm area is padded and shows visible wear, with the 'Power Close' branding and Mizuno logo printed in blue. The glove has five distinct finger stalls, each separated and reinforced, with additional padding visible along the thumb and pinky. Blue lacing is prominent along the webbing, perimeter, and finger seams, contributing to the glove's structure and flexibility. The back of the glove displays a textured surface and more blue lacing, with a partially open wrist strap for easy hand insertion.
description: A tan and blue Mizuno baseball glove with closed basket webbing, visible wear, and prominent blue lacing. Features five padded finger stalls and a partially open wrist strap.
description_view_0: Front view showing the glove's open palm, padded interior, 'Power Close' branding, and finger stalls.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the closed basket webbing and blue lacing along the thumb and wrist area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the glove's back, textured surface, and reinforced blue lacing along the fingers and perimeter.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the glove's edge, blue lacing, and the partially open wrist strap.
attribute_finger_stalls: Five finger stalls, each individually separated and padded, with reinforced edges and visible internal padding.
attribute_lacing_style: Cross-laced and single-laced blue lacing, prominent along the webbing, finger seams, and perimeter.
attribute_brand_logo: Mizuno logo visible on the palm in blue, with 'Power Close' branding printed below it.
attribute_wrist_strap_design: Partially open wrist strap with no visible closure mechanism, shaped for easy hand insertion and adjustment.
